perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long hair is standing on a cruise ship deck, wearing a white nautical-themed tube top, a denim skirt, and a sailor hat. She smiles at the camera and starts moving her hands in a rhythmic dance. (2) She removes her sailor hat, spins it playfully, and runs her fingers through her hair while swaying her hips. (3) She continues the dance routine with fluid arm movements and finishes with a cheerful pose against the backdrop of the ocean.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat electronic dance music track starts with a fast-tempo synth beat. (2) High-pitched female vocal samples begin repeating rhythmic syllables in a cheerful tone. (3) The music maintains a steady rhythmic drive with electronic percussion until the clip concludes. No ambient wind or sea noise is audible.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: "當看見船長時..." (When seeing the captain...). The tone is playful and situational, providing a humorous context for the dance performance.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator performing a dance in the center of the frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long brown hair, wearing a white tube top with ship steering wheel patterns, a light blue denim mini skirt, and a navy-style striped hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A white metal railing on a ship deck with the vast blue ocean and a cloudy sky in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a short-form performance piece intended for entertainment and social engagement. By using the hook text about 'seeing the captain,' the creator establishes a playful role-playing context to showcase her dance skills and nautical-themed outfit while on a cruise vacation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video focuses on a personal dance performance without highlighting specific commercial products or brands.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The creator uses a specific 'POV' text hook combined with a matching outfit and synchronized dance moves.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard social media format where influencers perform viral dances in aesthetically pleasing or unique travel locations to gain visibility.
